ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address of the student */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled */,
  "certification_level" TEXT /* Current certification level of the student */,
  "total_flight_hours" INTEGER /* Total flight hours completed by the student */,
  "last_flight_date" TEXT /* Date of the last flight taken by the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airplanes" (
  "airplane_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the aircraft */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the aircraft */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the aircraft */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the aircraft was manufactured */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the aircraft (e.g., operational, maintenance) */,
  "hours_flown" INTEGER /* Total hours the aircraft has flown */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "location" TEXT /* Current location of the aircraft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airplane_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification level of the instructor */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Current availability status of the instructor */,
  "total_teaching_hours" INTEGER /* Total teaching hours of the instructor */,
  "specializations" TEXT /* Specializations of the instructor */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the instructor based on performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "student_id" TEXT /* ID of the student assigned to the flight */,
  "airplane_id" TEXT /* ID of the aircraft used for the flight */,
  "instructor_id" TEXT /* ID of the instructor assigned to the flight */,
  "takeoff_time" TEXT /* Scheduled takeoff time for the flight */,
  "landing_time" TEXT /* Scheduled landing time for the flight */,
  "actual_takeoff_time" TEXT /* Actual takeoff time for the flight */,
  "actual_landing_time" TEXT /* Actual landing time for the flight */,
  "flight_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the flight in minutes */,
  "flight_type" TEXT /* Type of flight (e.g., VFR) */,
  "area" TEXT /* Flight area or path */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for any changes or cancellations */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_airplane_id FOREIGN KEY ("airplane_id") REFERENCES airplanes ("airplane_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "airplane_id" TEXT /* ID of the aircraft undergoing maintenance */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance activity */,
  "technician_id" TEXT /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "parts_replaced" TEXT /* Parts that were replaced during maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_airplane_id FOREIGN KEY ("airplane_id") REFERENCES airplanes ("airplane_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification */,
  "certification_name" TEXT /* Name of the certification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the certification */,
  "required_flight_hours" INTEGER /* Required flight hours to earn the certification */,
  "expiry_period" INTEGER /* Expiry period of the certification in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_certifications" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification record */,
  "student_id" TEXT /* ID of the student who earned the certification */,
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the certification earned */,
  "date_earned" TEXT /* Date the certification was earned */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the certification expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_certifications_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_certifications_certification_id FOREIGN KEY ("certification_id") REFERENCES certifications ("certification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight schedule */,
  "student_id" TEXT /* ID of the student scheduled for the flight */,
  "airplane_id" TEXT /* ID of the aircraft scheduled for the flight */,
  "instructor_id" TEXT /* ID of the instructor scheduled for the flight */,
  "scheduled_time" TEXT /* Scheduled time for the flight */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the flight schedule */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Any special remarks or instructions for the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_schedules_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_schedules_airplane_id FOREIGN KEY ("airplane_id") REFERENCES airplanes ("airplane_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_schedules_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructor_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability record */,
  "instructor_id" TEXT /* ID of the instructor */,
  "available_from" TEXT /* Start time of availability */,
  "available_to" TEXT /* End time of availability */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of availability */,
  "reason_for_unavailability" TEXT /* Reason for instructor unavailability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructor_availability_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)
